resultList.dtldesc: Discover a stunning 5 BHK home for sale in Bhagat Heritage, Sector 36, Kamothe, Navi Mumbai. This east-facing, vaastu-compliant residence ensures harmonious living in a premium locality. Thoughtfully designed for spacious comfort, it offers an ideal blend of style and functionality. A perfect choice for those seeking a luxurious and serene lifestyle.Property Specifications This luxurious duplex apartment spans a super built-up area of 3,900 sq. ft. and is situated on the 12th and 13th floors of a 13-story building, offering breathtaking greenery views and ample natural light. Complemented by two expansive terraces 1,500 sq. ft. and 2,000 sq. ft., it is the epitome of comfort and elegance.The 12th floor features two spacious bedrooms with attached western-style bathrooms equipped with geysers, a living-cum-dining area, a modular kitchen with a chimney, and a utility area. Three balconies, including two attached to the bedrooms and one to the living room, provide picturesque views of the surrounding greenery.The 13th floor includes three well-designed bedrooms, two bathrooms one attached and one common with geysers, and two balconies connected to the bedrooms. An open terrace adds a stunning outdoor space for leisure and gatherings. A modular kitchen with a chimney, as well as a normal kitchen, caters to all culinary needs, enhanced by a piped gas connection. The property boasts premium Italian marble and vitrified tile flooring, is vaastu compliant, and faces east for abundant positive energy. FacilitiesAdditional conveniences include two covered parking spaces, borewell and corporation water supply, 100 power backup, security guard services, CCTV surveillance, and a harmonious living environment. A perfect choice for those seeking a blend of luxury, functionality, and tranquility.Locality Located behind Zudio in Kamothe, this area offers excellent convenience and accessibility. Reputed schools and hospitals are within 1 km, catering to educational and healthcare needs. Malls, supermarkets, banks, and ATMs are situated nearby for daily essentials. With public transport readily available and Mansarovar Railway Station just a 4-minute drive away, this locality ensures seamless connectivity.
